key.name: poll-interval
key.description: How often the extension calls `tailscale status --json` to refresh its UI. Lower values feel snappier but slightly increase CPU/wakeups.

key.name: show-indicator
key.description: If true, a small Tailscale icon appears next to the Wi-Fi indicator while Tailscale is connected.

key.name: tailscale-binary
key.summary: Path to the tailscale CLI binary
key.description: Override if `tailscale` is not on PATH for the user running gnome-shell.

key.name: shortcut-show-menu
key.summary: Shortcut: open the Tailscale quick settings menu

key.name: shortcut-open-admin-panel
key.summary: Shortcut: open the Tailscale admin console in a browser

key.name: shortcut-send-file
key.summary: Shortcut: send a file via Taildrop

key.name: taildrop-accept
key.description: When enabled, `tailscale file get --loop` runs in the background and writes incoming files to the inbox directory.

key.name: taildrop-inbox
key.summary: Directory where Taildrop files are saved

key.name: feature-taildrop
key.description: Default off: the tailnet usually has to be granted Taildrop by an admin before it's useful. Users opt in once availability has been confirmed.

key.name: feature-funnels
key.description: Default off: Funnel requires the "funnel" nodeAttr to be granted in the ACL. Users opt in once availability has been confirmed.

key.name: feature-exit-nodes-saved
key.summary: Saved exit-node target while the Exit-nodes feature is off
key.description: Holds the exit node that was active when the user disabled the Exit-nodes feature in prefs. Re-enabling the feature restores it.

key.name: feature-dns-saved
key.summary: Saved Magic-DNS state while the Magic-DNS feature is off

key.name: feature-routes-saved
key.summary: Saved accept-routes state while the Subnet-routes feature is off

key.name: feature-shields-up-saved
key.summary: Saved shields-up state while the Shields-up feature is off

key.name: feature-ssh-server-saved
key.summary: Saved SSH-server state while the SSH-server feature is off

key.name: feature-taildrop-available
key.summary: Cached: Taildrop usable on this tailnet
key.description: Default false ("assume admin-disabled"). The extension probes once at startup and on account changes; the "Check availability" button in prefs reruns the probe on demand.

key.name: feature-funnels-available
key.summary: Cached: Funnel enabled for this tailnet
key.description: Default false ("assume admin-disabled"). The extension probes once at startup and on account changes; the "Check availability" button in prefs reruns the probe on demand.

key.name: toast-duration
key.description: How long success / error / info toasts stay on screen after the action completes.

key.name: toast-min-spinner
key.description: Floor the pending-state spinner stays visible before transitioning to the result, so instant operations don't flash. 0 disables the floor.
